test.create_query: CREATE TABLE right (id Int64, k FixedString(16)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
CREATE TABLE left ( id Int64, v Nullable(Decimal(7, 2)) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO right SELECT number AS id, toFixedString(toString(intDiv(number, 200)), 16) AS k FROM numbers(2000000)
INSERT INTO left SELECT number % 2222222 AS id, rand() % 10000 FROM numbers(3000000)
test.query: SELECT r.k AS g, avg(l.v) FROM left AS l JOIN right AS r ON l.id = r.id GROUP BY g FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 16
SELECT r.k AS g, avg(l.v) FROM left AS l JOIN right AS r ON l.id = r.id GROUP BY g FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 32
